title: Submit Test Case Generation Form With All Required Fields Empty
description: Verify that submitting the test case generation form without selecting any requirement or template displays appropriate validation error messages and prevents generation.
expected_result: The system blocks form submission, displays field-level validation error messages for all required fields, and does not generate any test cases.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page
test_steps.expected: Test case generation page loads successfully

test_steps.action: Click the Generate Test Cases button without filling any fields
test_steps.expected: Form submission is blocked and validation errors appear

test_steps.action: Verify the requirement field error message is shown
test_steps.expected: Error message 'Please select at least one requirement' is visible

test_steps.action: Verify the template field error message is shown
test_steps.expected: Error message 'Please select a template' is visible

test_steps.action: Verify no test cases are generated (results panel remains empty)
test_steps.expected: Results panel is not visible or shows no generated content
